description: Single chip long-context inference, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct (~28K context). OOM at higher concurrency levels is expected and recorded.
_concurrency_levels_note: Client-side concurrency for long-context requests. Lower values used because ~28K-token requests are memory-intensive.
_request_count_note: offline uses request_count (50; long-context ~28K tokens, each run takes ~220s, 50 reqs × 3 = 150s/run is statistically sufficient for throughput), interactive uses interactive_request_count (100; each request ~11s sequential, 100 reqs × 2 runs ≈ 37 min; p90 is the primary tail metric for Suite D interactive due to long-context cost — p95 at 100 reqs is rank 95 which is marginal), online (extra) uses online_request_count (200, minimum for robust p95 at low QPS)
